'}, 'As part of an ongoing lawsuit, Ripple has responded to recent SEC motions by submitting a new information note to the court. It claims that the Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) has misquoted key points in Ripple's defense position.

In December, the SEC filed a lawsuit against Ripple, claiming that the XRP token sale represented an unregistered offering of securities.

As the lawsuit progressed, Ripple tried to defend itself, arguing that there was no due process of law and no notice on the status of the XRP token from the SEC. The company also requested documents filed by the Commission as evidence for the trial.

In April, the SEC filed a motion to reject the proposal, arguing that Ripple's defense position and claims tax the Commission on inappropriate obligations.

Now, in a new briefing note, Ripple accuses the Commission of omitting "key negotiation snippets" in its petition to dismiss the company's claims.

First, the Securities and Exchange Commission believes that Ripple stated the following: the request for information "was significant ... in building a defensive position based on the claim that the SEC inappropriately notified the company of XRP status." ...

However, in fact, the essence of Ripple's claim is that the request is valid regardless of whether the defendant's reasoning was successful or not.

A Ripple spokesman reiterated his statement in today's information note, which reads:

', {'type': 'italic', 'text': 'Filing is both related to building advance notice protections and ... applies regardless of whether the individual defendants realized that XRP would be considered a security or were recklessly unlawful.'}, '']

[{'type': 'text_link', 'text': '​​', 'href': 'https://telegra.ph/file/40571d55250ea57926864.jpg'}, {'type': 'bold', 'text': 'Blockchain company of co-founder of Ripple raised $ 53 million

'}, 'Founded by Ripple co-founder Arthur Britto, PolySign has closed a $ 53 million Series B funding round led by American bank Cowen with a strategic investment of $ 23 million.

The round was also attended by ', {'type': 'link', 'text': 'Blockchain.com'}, ", Race Capital, Sandia Holdings and PilotRock Investments.

According to the statement, the raised capital will be used by PolySign to accelerate the development of institutional-grade blockchain applications for storing and managing cryptocurrencies.

вҖңAs digital assets continue to grow and mature as an asset class, institutional investors need reliable storage and trading solutions that meet their requirements for investing in traditional securities,вҖқ said Cowen CEO Jeffrey Solomon.

As part of a strategic partnership, the bank and the blockchain company plan to use each other's experience to jointly implement a comprehensive digital asset management solution for institutions.

Custody services will be provided by Standard Custody & Trust Company, a subsidiary of PolySign, licensed as a cryptocurrency trust by the New York State Department of Financial Services (NYDFS).

The partners intend to use the Cowen digital banking platform to provide corporate investors with access to cryptocurrency markets.

вҖңThe synergy between PolySign and Cowen, an innovative, fast-growing capital markets platform, will fuel our next generation technology for financial markets,вҖқ said Arthur Britto."]

[{'type': 'text_link', 'text': '​', 'href': 'https://telegra.ph/file/ea95b43fcb4b1eda33aae.jpg'}, {'type': 'bold', 'text': 'Tether to add support for the Avalanche network amid high Ethereum fees

'}, 'Stablecoin issuer Tether is preparing to launch USDT token on the Avalanche blockchain. This was announced by the technical director of the company Paolo Ardoino.

The USDT release is expected in mid-June. Avalanche will be the ninth network to support the largest stablecoin on the market. USDT also works with Algorand, Simple Ledger Protocol (Bitcoin Cash), Ethereum, EOS, Liquid Network, Omni, Tron, and Solana.

Over the past years, Tether has been actively increasing the volume of USDT emissions in the Ethereum system, however, the growth of fees forced the company to look towards alternatives such as Tron. As a result, the USDT emission volume on Tron recently exceeded $ 31 billion, and on Ethereum it now stands at $ 27 billion.

Ardoino admitted that if the situation with Ethereum does not improve in the near future, the trend towards moving USDT to alternative systems will continue. вҖңAvalanche is growing in popularity.

It supports the Ethereum Virtual Machine (EVM), which makes it easy for decentralized finance projects to migrate to lower fees. It will be quite easy to get USDT up and running in this case, since we already have a tested and EVM-compatible build, вҖқhe said.

At the same time, Ardoino noted that so far Tether has no plans for further expansion on new blockchains.']

'}, "The company reported that the total amount of mined bitcoins increased by 62% compared to the previous quarter.

Nasdaq-listed bitcoin mining company Riot Blockchain (NASDAQ: RIOT) reported that its mining revenue grew almost 10x to $ 23.2 million in the first quarter.

Riot Blockchain also reported in 10 quarters filed with the US Securities and Exchange Commission that the margin from its mining operations was 67.5% in the first quarter, up from 40.4% in the same period last year.

Riot Blockchain reported first-quarter net income of $ 7.5 million, or 9 cents per share, compared with a net loss of $ 4.3 million, or 15 cents per share, in the previous period.

In April, Riot Blockchain acquired Whinstone US from Northern Data AG for $ 651 million in cash and stock. Whinstone was the owner and operator of North America's largest Bitcoin hosting service with an installed capacity of 300 megawatts and a long-term power purchase agreement.

Riot said it plans to achieve a total hash rate of 7.7 EH / s in the fourth quarter of 2022, subject to the full rollout of the expected fleet of approximately 81,146 Antminers acquired from Bitmain, 95% of which will be the latest generation S19 miner models."]

'}, 'The crypto-bull market at the beginning of 2021 became a blessing for LEDGER revenue. The company seeks to fill in hundreds of vacancies as its commercial activities expand.

On Wednesday, the company reported that the company's revenue increased by more than 500% from January to March. Ledger said it was profitable during the quarter, but did not reveal the actual numbers.

LEDGER is a company that created the Ledger Nano S and Nano X hardware wallets, which allow users to independently store digital assets, such as bitcoins (BTC). He competes for a market share with Trezor and several other less famous wallets.

"The whole industry is growing rapidly and we are proud to be part of it," said Ledger General Director Pascal Gauthier, calling his company "Talented and hardworking team."

Ledger significantly expands its internal capabilities: you must fill out more than 150 open positions. On Wednesday, the company announced that he took two senior positions headed by former Etoro and Opera leaders. Recently, the company assumed the role of Vice-President on NFT, or non-deliberate tokens, expanding its services to artists and the NFT management.

It is important to note that Ledger seems to recover from loud leakage in December 2020, as a result of which 2,000,000 CHYRTOKOKOCHEL buyers were revealed. The company confirmed that security disorder did not affect the safety of users. However, it led to a negative public response to the company.

It is still unknown whether such companies as Ledger will continue, the rapid expansion in the face of more serious market factors. On Wednesday, the cryptocurrency markets were sharply sold out, Bitcoin fell to $ 30,000, the altowel market as a whole followed this example. From a peak to a minimum, the market fell 1 trillion dollars from the middle of the middle of May 2.5 trillion dollars.']

[{'type': 'text_link', 'text': '​', 'href': 'https://telegra.ph/file/cf67a992e7e803df360b0.jpg'}, {'type': 'bold', 'text': 'Hetzner Bans Chia Mining Due To Damaged Disks

'}, 'Large German hosting provider Hetzner banned mining on its servers after users started mining Chia cryptocurrency with them.

The ban affected cloud servers, hosting services and storage servers.

Hetzner explained that "the use of servers for storage during the mining process leads to problems with the throughput of the host systems."

вҖңWhen mining, hard drives are exposed to excessive stress due to the multitude of read and write processes and therefore break,вҖқ the company wrote.

The largest data warehouse Hetzner BX60 offers 10 TB for 47.48 euros per month.

Recall that the Chia Network uses the Proof-of-Space and Proof-of-Time consensus algorithms [proof of space and time].

According to experts, Chia mining cuts the lifespan of a 512GB SSD from five years to two months. According to the creator of the coin, Bram Cohen, this does not apply to corporate SSDs or hard drives.

Chinese solid-state drive maker Galax has denied warranty service for the SSDs that Chia was mined on.']

[{'type': 'text_link', 'text': '​', 'href': 'https://telegra.ph/file/fda94d509c89059f5f2c5.jpg'}, {'type': 'bold', 'text': 'The Central Bank of the Netherlands canceled strict requirements for the withdrawal of cryptocurrencies from exchanges

'}, 'The central bank of the Netherlands has canceled its decision to introduce stricter measures to withdraw cryptocurrencies from exchanges. This is reported by the Bitonic crypto exchange.

In January, the Central Bank introduced new rules according to which crypto exchanges must collect additional data from their users when withdrawing cryptocurrency. Users were required to whitelist the recipient's address and provide "proof" of ownership of the address.

The central bank's rule cancellation came almost two months after Bitonic filed a complaint over the strict rules. вҖңApart from the fact that there is no technical advantage to verifying every address for every transaction, it also constitutes a serious violation of our customers' privacy rights,вҖқ Bitonic said in a statement.

In April, the Rotterdam District Court ruled that the crypto exchange has full right to challenge the new claims, and the Central Bank should consider Bitonic's objections and make a decision within six weeks.

The Central Bank said that the exchange's objections are justified and canceled the requirements for address verification.

The regulator still requires crypto exchanges to take adequate measures to verify that the person who withdraws funds is indeed the recipient of funds. But a clarification has been added to the official manual, according to which service providers can choose their own methods of customer verification, and not follow any specific instructions.']

[{'type': 'text_link', 'text': '​', 'href': 'https://telegra.ph/file/3560a3d760c0b93181c3b.jpg'}, {'type': 'bold', 'text': 'Pancake Bunny publishes investor compensation plan

'}, "After yesterday's robbery of the decentralized site PancakeBunny and the fall of the BUNNY token by 95% under the weight of this news, the exchange published a detailed report on the invasion and a compensation plan for investors.

In terms of rehabilitation, PancakeBunny once again highlighted the fact that not a single vault was hacked, and the hacker managed to carry out an economic exploit that combined an urgent lending attack and low liquidity on PCS V1 to receive approximately 6.9 million BUNNY tokens. and then throw it on the market. The actual damage is now accurately calculated, and it is $ 45 million.

PancakeBunny was able to get back to work, and in the next 90 days they intend to refund 100% of the performance fees. In addition, PancakeBunny intends to compensate BUNNY's owners for the difference in market capitalization at the time of the invasion and a current value of $ 39 million. For this, a special compensation pool will be formed and a new token pBUNNY will be issued. Later, the Original Holders will exchange their pBUNNY for BUNNY at a discount to the market rate.

вҖңWe will create a new compensation pool that will start accumulating compensation awards from four sources ... All pBUNNY holders will be able to claim their compensation compensation from the compensation pool on a regular, perhaps even daily basis.вҖқ

Sources of compensation will be: performance fees, compensation from the team, part of the returned funds and new tokens that will be released by the developers.

The PancakeBunny BUNNY token still hasn't recovered, after 95% yesterday. Now it is trading at $ 47.78, and on April 27 BUNNY set its own rate record at around $ 512.75. At the time of the exploit, the rate was falling from $ 172.05 to a minimum of $ 6.13."]

'}, "The UK authorities should pay attention to cryptocurrencies and create a regulatory sandbox where people can experiment with them. This point of view was expressed by the member of parliament of the country Tom Tugendat.

During a speech at a meeting in parliament, the Tugendat called on the authorities to encourage cryptocurrency innovation. Otherwise, Britain will be left on the sidelines, he warned.

вҖңThe Treasury needs to create a safe space for the development of cryptocurrency, because setting a standard for this new economy will form a new electronic era, a new digital world,вҖқ the politician said.

Earlier, the Bank of England said that it is not obliged to protect commercial banks from the potentially negative consequences of the spread of digital currencies. However, the chief economist of the regulator Andy Haldane admitted that their use could improve financial stability.

In January 2021, the UK Financial Conduct Authority warned of the risks of investing in cryptocurrencies. In the same month, independent financial advisor Neil Liversidge called on the country's government and parliament to ban Bitcoin transactions."]

[{'type': 'text_link', 'text': '​', 'href': 'https://telegra.ph/file/377be9f95bbe4a2908bd5.jpg'}, {'type': 'bold', 'text': "Dutch franchise Domino's pizzeria offers employees a salary in bitcoin

"}, "In honor of the annual holiday Bitcoin Pizza Day, the management of the Dutch franchise Domino's Pizza offered employees to receive a salary in the first cryptocurrency. CoinDesk reports.

Immensus Holding operates 16 Domino's pizzerias in the Netherlands with over 1000 employees. They will be able to decide how much of their salary they want to receive in Bitcoin using the BTC Direct service.

вҖңWe work with a large number of young employees. We hear them talk about bitcoin and we want to offer them the opportunity to own cryptocurrency, вҖқsaid Jonathan Gurevich, co-founder of Immensus.

Dutch law requires an employer to pay the minimum wage in euros only. However, employees may prefer other payments in bitcoin.

Every year on May 22, the cryptocurrency community celebrates Bitcoin Pizza Day. The reason for the celebration was a landmark event for the industry, when in 2010 the programmer Laszlo Heinitz purchased two pizzas for 10,000 BTC. They are worth $ 360 million at the time of writing."]

[{'type': 'text_link', 'text': '​', 'href': 'https://telegra.ph/file/cace7f42dd8564d01e5c7.jpg'}, {'type': 'bold', 'text': 'European Central Bank assessed the impact of cryptocurrencies on the traditional financial system

'}, 'The regulator also drew attention to the impact of the digital asset mining industry on the environment.

Representatives of the European Central Bank (ECB) assessed the risks associated with the pressure of cryptocurrencies on the traditional financial system. The regulators published their position on the issue in the next report.

According to the ECB team, cryptocurrency should not be regarded as a serious threat to traditional financial institutions. Analysts called the risks associated with the new financial instrument вҖңlimitedвҖқ.

вҖңCrypto assets have not yet reached widespread adoption in the payments industry. In the eurozone, traditional organizations are little affected by cryptocurrency-related financial instruments. Accordingly, the risks associated with the impact of crypto assets on financial stability are currently limited, вҖқthe ECB said in a report.

In the report, representatives of the regulator drew attention to the high level of bitcoin volatility and the negative impact of the mining industry on the environment. We will remind, earlier the problem of harm, which the mining of cryptocurrencies causes to nature, was taken up by the American authorities.

Notably, the European Central Bank team's view of cryptoassets has changed dramatically over the past few years. Back in the spring of 2018, representatives of the ECB called cryptocurrencies "a pitiful excuse for money." Already in the fall of 2020, against the background of the active work of many countries on the creation of a digital version of the national currency, the regulator began to develop a virtual euro.']

[{'type': 'text_link', 'text': '​', 'href': 'https://telegra.ph/file/b649fb9146b99dbcb135c.jpg'}, {'type': 'bold', 'text': 'DeFi Protocols UMA and Opium Launch SpaceX Launch Insurance Solution

'}, "DeFi-based cryptocurrency derivatives platform Opium Protocol has announced a partnership with decentralized marketplace UMA to launch the Optimistic Oracle solution. This is stated in a press release from the developers.

A new tool from UMA transfers off-chain data to the blockchain, making transactions faster and cheaper. The Oracle assumes that all requests are correct. The deal is made with the minimum amount of gas involved.

If one of the users does not agree, the dispute is submitted to the Data Verification Engine. It is similar to the usual logic: legal contracts are executed, because otherwise the unscrupulous participant faces a court that guarantees the execution of the transaction, and financial losses.

The Opium Protocol implemented a risk hedging solution through a decentralized insurance contract (CDS) linked to SpaceX's flights using the optimistic oracle UMA. This is the SmallSat Rideshare co-launch program. It assumes relatively cheap access to space for small satellite companies, starting at $ 1 million for a 220 kg payload.

вҖңHowever, the cost is still in the millions of dollars, and the owners of these payloads, mainly satellite operators, may want to insure the risk of a launch failure,вҖқ it said.

The tool will also allow other parties with a financial stake in the success or failure of a particular SpaceX mission to hedge risks or even speculate like in the regular financial market.

In February 2021, UMA and the YAM Finance project voted on a proposal to launch the synthetic uSTONKS contract, a basket of ten shares, the most popular in the r / WallStreetBets community on the Reddit platform."]

[{'type': 'text_link', 'text': '​', 'href': 'https://telegra.ph/file/81653978c6476adfae12c.jpg'}, {'type': 'bold', 'text': 'Compute North will place another 73 thousand miners from Marathon

'}, "The new 300-megawatt Compute North data center in Texas will host the newly acquired Marathon Digital Holding bitcoin miners, adding approximately 10.37 EH / s to the facility's hash power. Marathon claims its operations will be 70% neutral.

Both companies signed a binding letter of intent, which spells out the terms of the deal.

Compute North will receive an 18-month bridging loan from Marathon to finance the construction of its Texas facility, according to the statement. Under the terms of the original three-year contract, the contract will be implemented in phases from October 2021 to March 2022.

Marathon's executive chairman, Merrick Okamoto, cited Texas' favorable regulatory climate and low energy prices, as well as environmental considerations, as key factors in the decision.

вҖңThe new agreement with Compute North allows us to operate our mining fleet in a regulatory environment that has proven to be friendly to Bitcoin miners and at rates that we believe are among the lowest in the country,вҖқ he said.
Transferring Bitcoin Mining from China to North America

This deal marks the latest in a trend towards increased investment in Bitcoin mining in North America from industrial miners, including Marathon, Riot, Blockcap and others, who are purchasing miners in the tens of thousands.

This is also happening at a time when Chinese miners are cutting back on their operations in the wake of the recent crackdown on Bitcoin mining due to regulatory and environmental concerns."]

The company claims that the NFT chasing on Tezos consumes 2 million times smaller than energy than leading networks, such as Ethereum. Musicians who want to release NFT on Tezos will pay for their listing zero cost, while users will be able to pay for their collections in more than 135 fate currencies.

Oneof also plans to sacrifice part of its sales on environmental goals or charity on the choice of authors.

Dodge Kat said that he was "happy to work with OneOF" simultaneously on solving the problems of accessibility and environmental protection.

"The blockchain has the ability to democratize property and expand the economic opportunities of both artists and fans," said Lin Dai, General Director and Co-founder of Oneof. "We are building a technological company with the ideal" primarily a musician "and an environmental mission to help hundreds of millions of users who do not use cryptocurrency, use blockchain with simple and interesting uses such as NFT."

[{'type': 'text_link', 'text': '​', 'href': 'https://telegra.ph/file/ba7bd31a8346aac766698.jpg'}, {'type': 'bold', 'text': 'Iran introduced a complete ban on cryptocurrency mining until the end of September

'}, 'The mining of cryptocurrencies has been banned for several months in Iran, the Iran Front Page news agency reported, citing a statement from the country's President Hassan Rouhani.

вҖңAuthorized cryptocurrency mining does not consume a lot of electricity and only requires about 300 MW,вҖқ he said. - However, a lot of electricity is consumed by unauthorized miners. They account for about 2,000 MW. From now on, a ban on the extraction of cryptocurrencies even for authorized miners comes into force. "

Bloomberg previously wrote that Iran's power system is experiencing serious disruptions amid drought, declining electricity generation and illegal mining. Energy Minister Reza Ardakanian says the number of consumers has grown by a million since last year. This is due to the expansion of production, as well as the mining of cryptocurrencies. Legal miners account for only 16% of the increase.

The head of the state energy company Tavanir, Mohammadhassan Motevallizadeh, said his employees came under fire as they tried to get into the territory of the alleged illegal mining farm.

Problems with electricity in Iran have been present since the beginning of the year. In January, the authorities attributed them to a shortage of natural gas and partly to miners. There are more interruptions in the summer, but locals say the situation has never been so dire.

As a result, healthcare facilities are not always able to maintain low temperatures in coronavirus vaccine storage facilities. One of Tehran's marketing companies, which requires Internet access, said the shortest power outage was three hours, but there were cases when such periods stretched for 2-3 days.

According to Cambridge University estimates, Iran is the sixth largest country in terms of bitcoin computing power, with a share of 3.82%.']

'}, 'Applications for the registration of bitcoin-ETFs from SkyBridge Capital and from Fidelity Investments are under formal review by the US Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC). [{'type': 'text_link', 'text': '​', 'href': 'https://telegra.ph/file/89813c392a4c304985865.jpg'}, {'type': 'bold', 'text': 'CHAPTER BINANCE: No one can destroy Bitcoin

'}, 'According to the general director of the world's largest cryptocurrency exchange, it is already impossible to destroy the Bitcoin and the blockchain technology underlying it, so the governments of countries and regulators should take them

"I don't think someone can cover the Bitcoin project, considering that this technology is in the heads of 500 million people," said Chanpan Zhao

According to him, now the fight against Bitcoin and other cryptocurrencies will be similar to the refusal to accept the Amazon business model, when the e-commerce gigant only began its activities in the early 1990s. Cryptocurrencies are not intended to eliminate traditional finances or supported by the state fate currencies, but to ensure greater freedom of money.

Zhao noted that she did not intend to fight any governments or countries, and doubts about the work of Binance are more related to the lack of regulatory clarity:

"We do not go against governments. Now is the time that the rules are not very clear. They are still created in most states, therefore there are some gray zones. We just need to work together and clarify everything. "

It seems that Zhao does not have a clear strategy for his company, although Binance is actively involved in almost all fashionable CryptineNights (DEFI, NFT and toxiced real assets):

"I am not sufficient enough to predict the future and what direction will be popular. Binance is organized so that we spend a lot of experiments "

[{'type': 'text_link', 'text': '​', 'href': 'https://telegra.ph/file/70dbc6dbb7c8e29506da4.jpg'}, {'type': 'bold', 'text': 'Nigeria lifts ban on cryptocurrencies

'}, "Nigeria's news media reports that the Central Bank (CBN) has revised its ban on cryptocurrencies. The head of the department, Godwin Emefile, has allowed local residents to trade digital assets. He announced his decision four months after the ban was imposed. Cryptocurrency analysts believe the CBN governor is left with no choice but to allow digital coins to be traded.

Recall that in February, Nigeria issued a law that prohibits any transactions involving cryptocurrency. CBN director Bello Hassan signed the letter warning of harsh regulatory sanctions for those who do not comply with the directive. Now this ban has been canceled, but it is not fully known what caused it. Especially considering the fact that apart from the new record market capitalization of all digital assets, nothing has changed in the industry if you look at it globally.

Nigeria's relationship with Bitcoin has never been easy. The authorities have not issued any law that would equate cryptocurrency transactions with a crime. However, the government decided to show its influence on the cryptoindustry through restrictions and prohibitions in this industry.

CBN previously argued that this approach is due to the lack of regulation of the sphere. Because of this, there are many risks in it, which the department cannot avoid or minimize. In addition, Emefile stated that the lack of legal legal protection contributes greatly to the development of crime in the industry. This includes fraud and money laundering.

Now the head of CBN assures that cryptocurrencies and Bitcoin in particular can come to life in Nigeria and feel confident again. However, he still believes there is a huge amount of illegal activity around the digital asset space. Emefile noted that the investigation showed a disappointing result. According to him, most of the residents who are involved in cryptocurrency are associated with something illegal.

It's worth noting that the Nigerians ignored the February CBN ban. This is largely due to the high level of volatility in the local currency, naira (вӮҰ). A survey conducted a few months earlier showed that around 32% use cryptocurrency. For comparison, in the United States, the number of such people was only 6%.

After the ban in Nigeria, over-the-counter trade has grown significantly. The popularity of peer-to-peer exchanges has also risen. The high popularity of cryptocurrencies in the country allowed it to acquire the unofficial title of the African Bitcoin nation. Many analysts believe that the authorities can never completely restrict the network. It seems to them this realization came recently and CBN decided to change shoes."]

[{'type': 'text_link', 'text': '​', 'href': 'https://telegra.ph/file/0da777ecf27de12975ffe.jpg'}, {'type': 'bold', 'text': 'SEC indicted five promoters of BitConnect crypto pyramid

'}, 'The US Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) this evening disclosed allegations against five people, who are associated with "promoting a global unregistered offering of securities under the guise of digital assets, which attracted over $ 2 billion from retail investors." We are talking about the famous crypto pyramid BitConnect, which ceased to exist in 2018.

The SEC states that вҖңBetween January 2017 and January 2018, BitConnect used a network of promoters including US-based Trevon Brown (aka Trevon James), Craig Grant, Ryan Maasen, and Michael Noble (aka Michael Crypto). for the promotion and sale of securities under the вҖңlending programвҖқ вҖқ.

According to the regulator, the promoters offered and sold securities without the required registration, "including by posting videos in a 'recommendatory' style on YouTube, sometimes several times a day." For their activities, they received payment depending on their success in attracting investors.

The publication also mentions US-based Joshua Jeppesen, who "acted as a liaison between BitConnect and promoters and represented BitConnect at conferences and marketing events."

The SEC asks the court to prohibit the defendants from further engaging in such activities, as well as to recover from them misappropriated funds with interest and fines. The investigation of BitConnect's offenses continues, the regulator notes.']

[{'type': 'text_link', 'text': '​', 'href': 'https://telegra.ph/file/9001de690342284692e00.jpg'}, {'type': 'bold', 'text': 'Dan Held: Bitcoin enters the supercycle zone

'}, 'Bitcoin bull and head of marketing for cryptocurrency exchange Kraken Dan Held believes that Bitcoin is entering what he calls the "most favorable zone" of a possible supercycle.

Held coined the term "supercycle" to describe the sharp parabolic rally in bitcoin caused by various catalysts, including the emergence of institutional money.

In his opinion, institutional buying of bitcoin can be an important sign of the beginning of a super cycle and a giant rally looms on the horizon:

вҖңThe entry of institutions is an important signal for the supercycle, because it completely changes the dynamics of the volume of money entering the sphere. Some of these pension funds operate with billions of dollars in investments and this is a huge opportunity for buying bitcoin, so its rate should rise in order to satisfy all new market participants. Ark Invest conducted an analysis according to which 10% of the treasury reserves of public American companies invested in BTC would raise the asset rate to $ 400,000 "

According to the expert, in the next 4-8 months, BTC will enter the most favorable zone, which can bring the asset to radically new levels:

вҖңThe nearest time (from 4 to 8 months) is the most favorable zone for the bullran peak. Perhaps it will take up to 12 months, but it will be interesting to see what happens this year and early next year. "

Like hedge fund head Katie Wood, a Kraken manager predicts that central banks will be forced to buy bitcoin:

вҖңWhat happens when the world recognizes the value of bitcoin? It has long been considered a wondrous libertarian currency, but what happens in the event of massive FOMO and central bank purchases? In fact, the supercycle just describes a similar situation and an incredible bull run can await us as the world realizes the value of bitcoin "']

[{'type': 'text_link', 'text': '​', 'href': 'https://telegra.ph/file/729569722723a7015b198.jpg'}, {'type': 'bold', 'text': 'Crypto derivatives firm Hxro raises $ 15 million

'}, 'The CIO of a hedge fund backed by Alan Howard said the liquid options market is the next step in decentralized cryptocurrency trading.

Crypto derivatives firm Hxro (pronounced "hero") raised $ 15 million in token sales from hedge fund manager Commonwealth Asset Management.

An investment is the largest single investor fundraiser ever undertaken by a firm. It comes in the wake of the Hrxo Network, a decentralized protocol built on top of Solana that offers unlimited access to liquidity in the options markets.

Commonwealth is a global macroeconomic and real estate hedge fund with seasoned investors such as Louis Bacon and Alan Howard. Commonwealth Investment Director Adam Fisher said the fund decided to invest because of Hxro's plans to create liquidity and strengthen the market structure in the decentralized options market.

вҖңWhen volatility increases and liquidity decreases, market participants who need to adjust their position have little to do,вҖқ said Dan Gansberg, co-founder and CEO of Hxro, adding:

"It is one thing to attract large retail players to the market, but for macro funds or large hedge funds, the need to hedge and open an option position is greater than ever."

The Hxro network will provide increased liquidity as it will offer both an automated market maker and many other decentralized finance (DeFi) protocols and will allow traditional market makers to enter the network as well, Gansberg said. Traditional tables are primarily options-oriented private trading firms such as the Chicago Trading Company, he added.

Hxro started with a gambling binary futures product called MoonRekt. Since the company was founded, Hxro founders Gunsberg and Rob Levy have relied on their previous careers as traders in traditional markets to develop new products for crypto traders.']

[{'type': 'text_link', 'text': '​', 'href': 'https://telegra.ph/file/a3bf07da71370131461f5.jpg'}, {'type': 'bold', 'text': 'Master Ventures sets up a fund to support Polkadot

'}, 'Master Ventures, an Asian private venture capital firm, has set up a $ 30 million venture fund to support projects trying to integrate with Polkadot, as well as other early-stage protocol-based ventures, the company said Wednesday.

Polkadot is a unified network that aims to allow multiple blockchains to work together. Each of these blockchains is called a parachain and in order to connect to the main Polkadot network, they must connect via a limited number of parachain slots.

According to the announcement, Polkadot and Kusama, an autonomous network focused on experiments, are aiming to support the launch of more than 50 parachains in the next year and a half.

Through the foundation, Master Ventures hopes to support projects that compete for these parachain slots.

Parachain slots will be auctioned to the highest bidder projects and each project must contain Polkadot (DOT) or Kusama (KSM) depending on which protocol they want to use. When participating projects issue their own tokens, they are then вҖңhanded overвҖқ to DOT or KSM lenders.']

'}, "In Q1 2021, South Korean banks processed 64.2 trillion won (~ $ 57.9 billion) transactions on verified accounts linked to cryptocurrency exchanges, already exceeding the 2020 cumulative figure. Writes about this Maeil Business Newspaper with reference to the Financial Supervision Service of the country.

In 2020, the volume of such transactions reached 37 trillion won (~ $ 33 billion). During the reporting period, local credit institutions received almost ten times more commissions from cryptocurrency exchanges than in Q4 2020.

For example, cooperation with Upbit brought K-Bank $ 4.5 million. For comparison: for the entire last year, the bank's commission amounted to $ 500,000.

Nonghyup Bank has raised over $ 1.5 million from Bithumb and Coinone platforms. Shinhan Bank, which earned only $ 14,388 in the fourth quarter from its partnership with Korbit, received $ 130,400 in commission in the first three months.

For Nonghyup Bank and Shinhan Bank, these receipts do not exceed 1% in the total structure of income for the quarter, but neo-bank K-Bank, in addition to increasing profits, also recorded a significant increase in new users.

According to Cryptonews, K-Bank plans to renew its contract with Upbit this summer. Sources familiar with the matter also told the publication that other digital banks, such as Kakao Bank, are considering collaborating with players in the digital asset industry.

On January 30, 2018, the South Korean authorities banned anonymous cryptocurrency trading in the country. Every trader is required to identify himself with a bank account. In this case, the name of the account holder on the exchange must match the name of the account holder."]

'}, 'The list of countries wishing to launch their own digital currency (CBDC) is growing.

As a reminder, the Bank of Russia has confirmed that work on the creation of the crypto-ruble is in full swing. Moreover, this token can be used when paying taxes.

Now Ghana also conceived to develop a digital currency, its Central Bank announced the beginning of work to assess the consequences of the introduction of a new instrument.

As the head of the Central Bank Ernest Addison noted, the country will not rush to create a digital version of the Cedi national currency.

The regulator has a colossal research work in this direction. Its final stage will be testing the token in the mobile payment system. The design of the platform for processing transactions is already in full swing and will soon be completed, the official said.

Ghana will pioneer the continent in CBDC development, Addison said.

During his speech at a press conference, he said:

The Bank of Ghana will be one of the first African central banks to announce the start of work to create a digital currency.']

[{'type': 'text_link', 'text': '​', 'href': 'https://telegra.ph/file/5741cbdb74feb9175a7c5.jpg'}, {'type': 'bold', 'text': 'Media: Bitmain lowers the price of devices amid criticism of mining in China

'}, 'ASIC equipment manufacturer Bitmain has lowered the price of Antminer devices by 20% amid falling bitcoin rates and criticism of mining by the Chinese authorities. This was announced by journalist Colin Wu.

According to Wu, some Bitmain customers have demanded a refund of their hardware prepayment. The company allegedly rejected such applications, offering 4% per annum on advance payments and the option to "purchase other products in the future."

The journalist believes that this time the Chinese regulators had little influence on the manufacturers of ASIC devices. According to Antpool, the current shutdown price for the Antminer S19Pro is only $ 102.96. Wu also noted that the hashrate of the Bitcoin network is growing slowly, and Bitmain's main customers are overseas.

Earlier, Wu said that Bitmain takes an advance payment of 20% of the order amount, the minimum size of which is 1000 devices. The flagship Antminer S19Pro provides a hashrate of 110 TH / s and costs $ 10,230.

In a conversation with Portal do Bitcoin, the journalist stressed that the restrictions imposed by the government will only affect the major players in the industry. According to him, miners are panicking and looking for hosting in other countries, for example, in the USA and Canada.

On June 2, the Sichuan provincial government held a seminar on the use of surplus hydropower. According to TechNode, citing sources, at the end of the meeting, mining companies were allowed to stay in the region until the end of the rainy season, which usually lasts until October.']

[{'type': 'text_link', 'text': '​', 'href': 'https://telegra.ph/file/72141d9ae8f872aec23b1.jpg'}, {'type': 'bold', 'text': 'PNY cut SSD write resource by 80% due to Chia miners

'}, 'PNY has reduced the lifespan of its XLR8 CS3030 series SSD. The resource of some models has decreased by almost 80%, according to TomвҖҷs Hardware.

The XLR8 CS3030 Series includes 250GB and 500GB, 1TB, 2TB and 4TB devices. The new batch of drives has significantly reduced TBW.

Depending on the modification of the drive, the reduction in the guaranteed amount of recorded information reaches almost 80% - for the 2 TB model, this figure has decreased from 3115 to 660 TB.

The company explained its decision by the rush demand for solid-state drives for mining the Chia cryptocurrency.

вҖңThe write operation required to produce a Chia coin can wear out typical consumer SSDs for several weeks. Because of this, PNY changed the TBW policy in its SSD warranty. For customers using PNY drives as intended, the warranty period will likely expire before they reach the TBW thresholds, вҖқthe company said in a statement.

Another reason for the decline in the recording resource is the shortage of electronic components. For drives manufactured after May 17, 2021, PNY no longer specifies the type of NAND flash used. The publication admitted that the manufacturer switched from 3D TLC chips (three bits of information in a cell) to four-bit QLC solutions.

At the same time, the warranty period for XLR8 CS3030 drives remains the same and is 5 years.']

[{'type': 'text_link', 'text': '​', 'href': 'https://telegra.ph/file/8cff5f77262d726c1766a.jpg'}, {'type': 'bold', 'text': 'CFTC Commissioner Drew Attention to Illegal DeFi Services

'}, 'Apps from the decentralized finance (DeFi) space can violate the Commodity Exchange Act (CEA), said Dan Berkowitz of the US Commodity Futures Trading Commission (CFTC).

On Tuesday, Berkowitz gave a presentation on "Climate Change and Decentralized Finance: New Challenges for the CFTC." вҖңNot only do I think the unlicensed DeFi markets for derivatives are a bad idea, but I donвҖҷt see how they can be legal under the CEA,вҖқ the commissioner said.

He noted that CEA requires futures contracts to be traded in specialized contract markets in accordance with the CFTC license and regulation, but DeFi platforms do not register. Berkowitz believes regulators need to look into the topic of derivatives and other instruments in the DeFi space as their popularity skyrockets. He stressed that over the past 12 months, large volumes of "real money" have come to this market, and urged to prepare to protect society from abuse.

The emergence of new unregulated entities in the shadow banking system could threaten the competitiveness of regulated firms, he added. вҖңI find it unacceptable for unregulated, unlicensed derivatives markets to compete with fully regulated and licensed derivatives markets,вҖқ he said.']

[{'type': 'text_link', 'text': '​', 'href': 'https://telegra.ph/file/ed7563fd83971191f17bb.jpg'}, {'type': 'bold', 'text': 'Gemini acquires a crypto startup shaft x

'}, 'The crypto exchanger and the Gemini keeper acquired the Start X startup for an unseasured amount.

Announced this on Wednesday, Gemini stated that the technology of multilateral calculations (MPC) Shard X will help increase the speed with which it can transmit customer assets and increase the use of assets on its platform.

"The integration of MPC Shard X technology into Gemini's storage system allows us to satisfy the current demand for the rapid output of funds, interaction with DEFI stroke or digital assets with greater efficiency," said Gemini chief operating officer, Noah Perlman.

MPC is a cryptographic technology that is considered faster and safe. In MPC, the closed keys are never created completely, which eliminates the only point of refusal. MPC breaks off closed keys to segments or parts and distributes them between different parties to perform a transaction.

The Shard X technology, in particular, uses MPC technology on Entrust NShield (HSM) safety modules and the company argues that it provides the advantages of both these technologies, that is, the availability of hot or online wallets and the safety of the "cold" or autonomous storage place.

Shard X was founded in 2018 by Janin Noy-Nerner, Nikita Lesnikov and Navajo de Vet in London. Perlman told The Block that with the acquisition of Gemini all three members, that is, the whole state of the Shard X will join the British branch of Gemini.

Perlman refused to disclose the financial conditions of the transaction, including whether this was equity, cash or a combination of both. But he said that the deal was recommended by the internal strategic group, which is engaged in mergers and acquisitions.

This is the third acquisition of Gemini after buying the NFT Nifty Gateway trading platform in 2019 and Blockrize, which produces cryptocurrency at the beginning of this year.

Cryptocurrency transactions, especially in the sphere of storage cryptocurrency, grow rapidly. Last month, Galaxy Digital agreed to buy Bitgo's crypto-keeper for 1.2 billion dollars in cash and shares, which was the first deal in crypto industry for $ 1 billion. In March, Paypal acquired CURV, a cryptocurrency storage specialist.

As for Gemini, they intend to invest in a larger number of companies, Perlman said, without revealing the areas of interest. Gemini recently launched an investment fund, the purpose of which is to support cryptoprojects and startups in the early stages.']

[{'type': 'text_link', 'text': '​', 'href': 'https://telegra.ph/file/c4fca69971c010078335a.jpg'}, {'type': 'bold', 'text': 'Blockchain projects Xaya and Polygon became strategic partners

'}, "Autonomous Worlds, which develops the Xaya blockchain, has become a strategic partner of the Polygon blockchain project, formerly known as Matic.

Through this collaboration, the Xaya blockchain will be integrated into the Ethereum-compatible Polygon sidechain.

Games created with Xaya Game Channels (technology optimized for real-time PC gaming) are fully supported on the blockchain, allowing instant settlements and unlimited transactions.

Scalability is one of the strengths of Xaya. In addition, this platform is designed to represent fully decentralized games and entire meta-universes.

The Xaya team is known for creating the world's first game based on the Huntercoin blockchain back in 2013. Last June, the company joined the Ubisoft Entrepreneurs Lab.

Due to high fees, game developers and players are ditching Ethereum in favor of other blockchains that create games based on distributed ledger technology.

Thus, the partnership between Xaya and Polygon will allow the blockchain gaming industry to increase scalability and significantly expand the number of users."]

[{'type': 'text_link', 'text': '​', 'href': 'https://telegra.ph/file/8a765f5d39d1ba89fbcb5.jpg'}, {'type': 'bold', 'text': 'The Polugon blockchain project has received its own surveyor PolugonScan

'}, 'Recently, the creators of the blockchain viewer and analytic platform for Ethereum Etherscan have released an analogous solution for the Polgon network, which uses the PoS algorithm. It is released to receive accurate data from this block.

PolugonScan is based on the Etherscan conductor and provides a full set of data with the support of ERC-20 and ERC-721 tokens. It monitors transactions, invokes contracts and includes advanced functions such as Gas Tracker and API programming APIs for developers.

The Polgon blockchain provides a development environment similar to Ethereum and supports EVM. Its functions also make it easy for developers to transfer their contacts.

We are glad to have received support from the Etherscan team. Their experience in creating effective and useful blockchain monitors is unmatched in the entire industry.

I expect that PolgonScan will quickly become the most frequently used viewer in our growing PoS network, refilling the stack of PolgonScan with the Ethereum kit.

In addition, he told about the achievement of the project:

The last two months on Polugon observed a rise in activity. During this period, more than 400 projects of decentralized applications and decentralized financing (DeFi) have used our block.

In addition, Polgon has increased the number of transactions by four times compared to 7 million in Ethereum. Polugon can be more than 1, 3 million unique users. The main components of Polgon are Polgon SDK and autonomous chains, such as Polgon POS.']

[{'type': 'text_link', 'text': '​', 'href': 'https://telegra.ph/file/474765cefa05e5f51a486.jpg'}, {'type': 'bold', 'text': 'Central Bank of Brazil postponed the launch of digital real for two to three years

'}, 'The Central Bank of Brazil has postponed the launch of the state cryptocurrency by two to three years. Earlier, the Central Bank announced that it would release digital real next year.

According to a statement from the Bank of Brazil, the regulator will need more time to release the state cryptocurrency. The timing of the release of digital real depends on the development of the current projects of the Central Bank and the steps of other countries in this area.

вҖңAccording to the current assessment of the Central Bank of Brazil, the conditions for the issuance of the state cryptocurrency will be achieved in two to three years,вҖқ the Central Bank said.

The comments contrast with previous statements made by the country's Central Bank President Roberto Campos Neto, who said the country might be ready to go digital next year. The Central Bank of Brazil began exploring the possibility of issuing a state cryptocurrency last summer, and in April this year announced that it had made significant progress in development.

вҖңThe launch of the Brazilian state cryptocurrency could provide new tools to stimulate innovation and competition in the digital economy, reduce the use of cash and, therefore, the cost of maintaining it, improve cross-border payment processes, curb illegal activities and improve access to financial services,вҖқ the Central Bank said. Brazil.

The regulator also stated that it is вҖңactivelyвҖқ participating in international discussions regarding global standards for national cryptocurrencies, and that the next step will be to assess their impact on the Brazilian economy.

"After establishing general guidelines on the desired characteristics of digital real, open discussion with stakeholders will open up use cases and improve our understanding of the potential of government cryptocurrency in the particular case of the Brazilian economy."

According to the bank's plans, digital real will work in parallel with cash and bank deposits.']

'}, 'Texas Governor Greg Abbott has signed a bill defining the legal status of cryptocurrencies.

As Greg said, Abbott signed a bill defining the legal status of cryptocurrencies. The politician wrote about this on his Twitter:

вҖңI just signed into law that virtual currency is a secure transaction under the Texas Uniform Commercial Code. It defines the virtual currency, establishes when a person is entitled to it and when a person controls it. "

The governor's new law has already been passed by both houses of the legislature, even with the fact that the majority of the seats are held by Republicans. The bill allows Texas to become the leader of the US crypto industry.

The Governor's Act legislatively establishes the definition of the term "virtual currency", and also defines the standards for conducting cryptocurrency business in Texas.

It is known that every year the territory of the state is becoming more and more in demand by technology and IT companies. Now a whole confrontation has formed between the recognized leader, California and Texas.

The main attractions are the low corporate taxes, plus significantly lower infrastructure and real estate costs than more expensive California. In addition, this state is often among the top three in the country, among economic indicators: GDP is the second largest in the United States for 2019, Texas is the second in terms of population and the second largest territory.

Already, many companies are moving their businesses to Texas: Oracle changed its headquarters in California, Toyota invested $ 1 billion in 2017 and moved from California to Pleino, Tesla is building a new super plant in Texas and periodically threatens to move completely to this state.

Following tech companies, the Texas authorities are developing cryptocurrencies. Feel free to publicly express their favor, as one of the senators did recently.']

'}, 'The Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) postponed the decision on another application for the Bitcoan Exchange Fund (ETF)

The Agency has published a notice of extending the application for the application for Kryptoin ETF, June 9.

The notification said that the Commission will postpone its decision another 45 days before July 27, 2021.

"The Commission considers it appropriate to designate a longer period for taking measures to change the rule, so that it has enough time to consider the proposed change to the rule and received comments," the notification says.

Kryptoin resumed its bid on Bitcoin-ETF in April of this year, when he filed amendments to the application, inactive since 2019. In the changed S-1, CBoe BZX was named as an intended exchange, and CBoe filed the required 19B-4 weeks later, putting a commission for a 45-day countdown of the comment period. The Commission received two comments on the proposed change in the rule in the initial period of comments.

However, SEC has the experience of renewing cryptoproduct recognition period.

Last month, SEC canceled its decision on the proposed Wisdomtree Bitcoin-ETF until July 14, and in April, the Vaneck offer was extended in the same way. All three are tied to CBoe.']

[{'type': 'text_link', 'text': '​', 'href': 'https://telegra.ph/file/5f08ad8b2a9cddb126978.jpg'}, {'type': 'bold', 'text': 'Media: Bitcoin drives MicroStrategy stocks up

'}, 'After the decision to spend $ 1.5 billion to buy additional bitcoins, MicroStrategy's share price against the market rose 5.36%. Reporter Colin Wu drew attention to this.

Tesla fell 2.97%, Coinbase - 2.88%, Jack Dorsey Square lost 1.39%, the journalist noted.

On June 14, the business analytics software provider announced a $ 500 million convertible senior bond offering with a 6.125% coupon interest. The company will use the raised funds to buy bitcoin, as well as the capital from the announced additional issue of shares for $ 1 billion.

"The market value of MicroStrategy is $ 6.14 billion, and its 92,079 BTC is worth $ 3.69 billion. After continuing purchases, it will become a true Bitcoin ETF," says Colin Wu.

In a recent interview with CNBC, the head of MicroStrategy Michael Sailor did not actively deny such a comparison, but emphasized the advantages of the company's shares over ETFs.

He also recalled that this is not the first time the firm has raised debt financing to buy the first cryptocurrency.

However, according to Colin Wu, interest rates on the latest tranche of bonds could be a problem for the company.

"The interest rate is 6.125% per annum, or $ 30.625 million. As soon as the price of MicroStrategy shares falls, for example, below $ 397.99, the pressure on convertible bonds that the firm will face will be enormous," the journalist said.']

[{'type': 'text_link', 'text': '​', 'href': 'https://telegra.ph/file/1b042e2c144e816891b04.jpg'}, {'type': 'bold', 'text': 'Solana invests $ 3 million in PARSIQ data platform

'}, 'PARSIQ blockchain data monitoring platform raised $ 3 million.

The firm said the funding round was led by the Solana Foundation and Axia8 Ventures and included Mindworks VC, Krypital Group, CoinUnited, Transfero Swiss, Elevate Ventures, Sanctum Ventures, and more.

The set of smart tools offered by PARSIQ includes notifications of token transfers, price fluctuations and other blockchain-related movements. According to the PARSIQ documents, users can customize their notification settings to block unwanted noise while receiving critical information in real time.

Solana founder Anatoly Yakovenko said that, in his opinion, access to blockchain data through applications such as PARSIQ will help Solana-based projects "get rid of the problems in building their stack, which will allow them to focus on their product."

Platform tools are compatible with Bitcoin, Ethereum, Solana and other blockchains.

In the fall of 2019, PARSIQ held a public offering of tokens, raising 1.6 million euros. According to CoinGecko, at time of publication, the PRQ token has a market cap of $ 100 million and is trading at $ 0.86.

Evan Cheng, director of research at Facebook Novi Financial, joined the platform as an advisor after participating in the round as a private investor. Axia8 CEO Wayne Lin also joined as an advisor.']

[{'type': 'text_link', 'text': '​', 'href': 'https://telegra.ph/file/814ad8285de651d68cb87.jpg'}, {'type': 'bold', 'text': 'Swiss BBVA Premium Clients will be able to trade cryptocurrency

'}, 'The service allows you to invest in digital assets and combine them with traditional in one portfolio.

After six months of testing, the Swiss division BBVA launches the service of trading and storing cryptoacivals. It will be available from June 21 for all customers of personal banking services. This bank announced on its website.
  
You can sell digital currencies through the bank's mobile application. The new functionality will allow you to store traditional and digital financial assets in one portfolio. What kind of cryptocurrencies will offer BBVA to customers - it is not clear. Only Bitcoin is mentioned in release.

"The gradual deployment allowed the Swiss division BBVA to test the work of the service, strengthen security and, above all, to understand that among investors there is a demand for digital assets as a way to diversify their portfolios, despite their volatility and high risk," Alphonso Gomez explains Director of the Swiss BBVA division.

Cryptocurrencies will be stored on BBVA accounts - the bank will perform the functions of the Custodian. You can convert Euro, dollars and Swiss francs to digital assets, and vice versa. The new service is still running only in Switzerland, because there is a regulatory framework for digital assets in the country. The Bank also reported that it would not advise on these types of investments.

Banco Bilbao Vizcaya Argentaria (BBVA) is one of the largest banking companies in Spain. It has offices in many countries of the world, including Russia. Bank customers are large corporations and minor entrepreneurs. BBVA Bank has been functioning over 100 years.

In early June, the head of Tinkoff Oliver Hughes said that the bank would like to offer customers to trade in cryptoactivities, but until it could do this. Hughes shared the observation that professional investors prefer cryptoactive class.']

[{'type': 'text_link', 'text': '​', 'href': 'https://telegra.ph/file/68623faaa636b44884bbf.jpg'}, {'type': 'bold', 'text': 'JPMorgan buys investment platform Nutmeg

'}, "JPMorgan Chase (JPM.N) acquired UK digital wealth manager Nutmeg as part of the US bank's expansion into the UK retail banking and investment market.

The American bank intends to battle established UK retail banking competitors and a growing group of fintech companies with plans to become a full-service retail bank under its Chase brand. It will compete with the consumer brand Marcus, owned by Goldman Sach (GS.N), which launched in the UK in 2018.

Nutmeg, with over 140,000 customers and over ВЈ 3.5 billion ($ 4.89 billion) in assets under management, will form the backbone of JPMorgan Chase's global digital wealth management, Nutmeg said in a statement.

Financial terms of the deal were not disclosed, but a source close to the deal said the company valued Nutmeg at around ВЈ 700 million ($ 972.79 million).

Founded in 2012, Nutmeg has sought to revolutionize the traditional wealth management market by offering cheaper automated financial planning services.

Although it quickly became one of the UK's most prominent financial technology companies and robotics consultants, it has yet to make a profit. In its latest set of full accounts for 2019, the group suffered a pre-tax loss of ВЈ 22 million.

JPMorgan confirmed the acquisition and said it will complement the group's UK-based digital bank launch under the Chase brand later this year.

вҖңWe are building Chase in the UK from the ground up using cutting edge technology and focusing on customer experience вҖ” a philosophy Nutmeg shares with us,вҖқ said Sanoke Viswanathan, General Manager of International Consumers at JPMorgan Chase.

JPMorgan already launched a product partnership with Nutmeg in November.

The Nutmeg deal follows rival US bank Goldman Sachs group Inc (GS.N) plans to shift the focus of its UK consumer unit Marcus towards wealth and investment. The bank told Reuters last month that it intends to offer a robo-consultant to Marcus clients in the country by the first quarter of next year.

Banking industry experts said that while Nutmeg's customer base is small compared to that of major banks, this will give JPMorgan an initial user base in the UK, where it does not yet have a consumer presence.

вҖңI donвҖҷt think this is a big expense, and it gives them the opportunity to move quickly in the UK market,вҖқ said Chris Skinner, CEO of financial technology research firm The Finanser."]

[{'type': 'text_link', 'text': '​', 'href': 'https://telegra.ph/file/0e48fabdfb0a3ffb48a9d.jpg'}, {'type': 'bold', 'text': 'A16z teamed up with Deutsche Telekom to host CELO

'}, 'Deutsche Telekom, one of Europe's leading telecommunications companies, is joining forces with venture capital giant Andreessen Horowitz (a16z) to help secure Celo's first mobile payments network.

The move further solidifies the telecoms companyвҖҷs adventurous stance towards participation in next-generation blockchains.

As announced on Tuesday, T-Systems MMS, Deutsche Telekom's digital innovation arm, is now making its own вҖңsignificantвҖқ investment in CELO tokens, as well as another delegated share of tokens held by a16z. The venture capital firm has invested in Celo in major rounds in both 2019 and 2021.

Becoming both a sponsor and a PoS infrastructure provider for Celo, adds to the supporting roles that T-Systems brings to the Flow blockchain as well as Oracle Chainlink's Decentralized Finance (DeFi) service.

T-Systems MMS blockchain chief Andreas Dittrich says betting on Celo is "the same."

What's really interesting, he said, is the creation of use cases based on these networks. The obvious first opportunity comes with peer-to-peer payments because Celo is designed for open mobile transactions with extremely low fees and no middlemen. T-Systems is the largest telecommunications company in Europe in terms of revenue.

вҖңI think Celo is insanely easy to acquire users, banks if you like. Obviously, it's not that interesting if you already have a PayPal account and a lot of credit cards or something else, вҖқDittrich said in an interview, adding:

вҖңBut think of the young people who are simply joining the financial system in developing countries, for example in Southeast Asia, where peer-to-peer payments are of paramount importance; think about things like money transfers and sending data overseas without relying on Western Union, which charges terrible fees. "']

'}, 'According to Arcane Research, the amount of open positions in the BTC futures market is $ 11.3 billion, which is 59% below the peak of $ 27.3 billion, observed on April 13

The report reports that the decline in volumes indicates that at the moment institutional investors are careful. It is also noted that three-month BTC futures are in backfills (traded with a discount to current spot prices). It is usually perceived as a bearish signal.

The amount of open positions on the Chicago Commodity Exchange (CME) in relation to the entire market at the end of May showed growth, but now decreases. According to information, the amount of open positions on CME is now 12.2% of the BTC futures market and this fourth place after the Binance trading platforms (22.5%), Okex (14%) and BYBIT (12.9%).

"You can say with confidence that institutional interest weakened. In general, the institutions wish to work with cryptocurrent, but their ability to return is limited to recent volatility in the market, "said Nathan Cox chief investment director Two Prime

Some analysts note that the decline in futures activity indicates departure towards other market participants.

"The current situation shows that many retail traders burned at the time of falling the market," the head of the Crypto Finance AG Trade Department Patrick Hoisser says.

Nevertheless, Nathan Coke preserves optimism regarding the market to the market of large investors who want to buy assets in cheaper:

"As the situation stabilizes, I expect major institutions to declare their positions that were accumulated during the course rollback"']

'}, "Digital payment platform Wirex has announced a partnership with crypto storage operator Fireblocks. This will make it easier for users to access the DeFi level interest rate market.

Wirex, which created the world's first cryptocurrency-enabled debit card, supports decentralized funding for its products.

The new development will be supported by Fireblocks, a cryptocurrency storage company from Israel, with a market capitalization of almost $ 1 billion. Earlier, the project received significant investments from America's oldest bank, BNY Mellon.

The collaboration is built around the new Wirex X-Accounts product. By opening accounts, users will be able to take advantage of interest rates of up to 16% on cryptocurrency and fiat assets through the use of Aave, Uniswap, MakerDAO and 1inch DeFi applications.

DeFi-backed interest rates offered by X accounts are likely to prove competitive. Another leading provider of cryptocurrency savings accounts, YouHodler, offers 12.73% on USD deposits, according to Cryptotesters. X accounts will generate 10% of crypto assets and up to 16% of fiat funds."]

Will Shiba Inu (SHIB) ever reach 1 cent or even $1?  
 
It's a Doge-Eat-Doge World Out There 
 
Shiba Inu is the latest meme coin. Its holders are promising it will make you an overnight millionaire. 
 
And they have proof to back up their claims. 
 
In August, a Shiba holder spent $3,400 on the meme coin. Now itвҖҷs worth $1.5 billion. 
 
Impressed yet? If not, consider another dog coin baron. 
 
This one bought $8,000 worth in August. ItвҖҷs now worth $5.7 billion. For those counting, thatвҖҷs $8,000 to $5.7 billion in about 400 days. 
 
Some are calling it the вҖңgreatest trade ever.вҖқ 
 
Not quite. 
 
Shiba has leapfrogged dogecoin to become the ninth-most valuable crypto in the world. 
 
Obviously, thatвҖҷs not a buy signal. 
 
So why is Shiba pumping? Well, apart from the fact that the majority almost always buy green and sell red...

["The вҖңDogecoin KillerвҖқ 
Crypto whales use meme coins as a gauge of how much new -- and unsophisticated -- money is moving into the crypto markets. And then they do everything they can to take that money from them. 
 
(Anecdotal, but almost everyone I've talked to who's recently gotten into crypto started with a dog coin.) 
 
This morning, for kicks, I asked crypto whale watcher Justin Gupta of ", {'type': 'link', 'text': 'CryptoDash.live'}, ' what he thought about Shiba. 
 
вҖңCryptocurrencies are volatile as is,вҖқ said Justin. вҖңBut when they are not well distributed, and only a few control a large portion of the tokens, they become even more so. This is because these few individuals can move the market at their whim.вҖқ 
 
In the case of Shiba, Justin explained, nearly 1/5th of the supply is controlled by two accounts: вҖңMeaning at any given moment, if these accounts decide to dump, they could trigger a massive panic sell-off and crash the asset.вҖқ 
 
One fifth of Shiba is held by 2 accounts 
Compare that to Dogecoin, where the top two accounts hold 10% of total circulating supply. 
 
But, in the endвҖҰ']

['It DoesnвҖҷt Matter 
 
The reality of the current crypto market is that virtually nobody cares about the technology or tokenomics. Consider, months ago Shiba pumped 300% after Elon Musk tweeted he would be getting a Shiba Inu dog. 
 
And to the untrained eye, Shiba seems cheap. 
 
It's currently sitting at $0.00007253. 
 
But, the market cap is $40 billion, bigger than Robinhood. Bigger than Sysco Corp., the largest food distribution company in America. (And its circulating supply is around 550 trillion.) 
 
If youвҖҷre buying into Shiba today itвҖҷs because youвҖҷre convinced itвҖҷs going to 1 cent. Maybe even $1. IвҖҷll tell you right now. ItвҖҷs not going to happen. 
 
Yes, this points to new money coming into this space. But there are clearly other things driving this mania. Sometimes these things are best expressed with memes: 
 
 
Richard Burton, a designer for DeFi projects, brought up an important point that gets far less attention than the money printers: barriers to entry in traditional finance. 
 
Shiba Inu, he wrote, вҖңis what happens when you stop generations of Americans from investing in startups with Accredited Investor Laws designed to 'protect people.'" 
 
Perhaps lower barriers to entry mean we create more informed investors. OrвҖҰ as in the case with all meme coins and stocksвҖҰ perhaps not. 
 
NB: Shiba Inu is not the next bitcoin. More likely, itвҖҷll be where most newbies get fleeced. If youвҖҷre looking for solid advice on the projects worthy of your hard-earned money, look no further

One of the secrets few know and fewer implement when it comes to trading success is that you have to really care about doing well. These days, I see a lot of traders not caring enough, not prioritizing learning about trading, and making pathetic weak-willed excuses.вҖқ вҖ“ Chris T.  
 
Perfectionism - a bane of the trading world 
When people look for a solution to their trading problems, they tend to look for the solution in the wrong places, having the wrong mindset. One problem with most traders is perfectionism. For instance, we tend to go to those who promise us 50% to 100% per week or month. If someone gives an estimate of 5% profits per month, we would think that is too small. If an investment salesperson promises huge returns in a short period of time, weвҖҷre drawn to them. 
 
What if I tell you that 5% per month is good returns on your trading or investment, would you agree with me? Is 60% growth per annum not good enough?  
 
Many years ago, one of my mentors in the financial industry told me that, even 20% growth per annum is good.  
 
In schools, we tend to ridicule those who make average grades and praise those who make excellent grades. The same is true of the world of sports. Do you think great sports teams win all their matches always?  
 
No! But they do well over time.  
 
Most of those who do well in life are correct less than half of the time.

Forex Trading Versus Binary Options: Which One Is Better?

вҖңNobody can predict the future. A Harvard PhD and a high school dropout have equal skills at prophecy.вҖқ вҖ“ James Altucher

ItвҖҷs no longer a secret that Forex market is the biggest and the fastest-growing market in the world. ItвҖҷs also not a secret that majority of Forex traders end up sustaining negativity, simply because they donвҖҷt know or they fail to do what can really make them profitable.

As a result of this, many people have been singing praises of binary options* as a wonderful alternative, casting aspersions on Forex. They think itвҖҷs easier to make money from binary options than from Forex. Is that correct? What are binary options? Investopedia defines it as a type of option in which the payoff is structured to be either a fixed amount of compensation if the option expires in the money, or nothing at all if the option expires out of the money. The success of a binary option is thus based on a yes/no proposition, hence вҖңbinary.вҖқ

вҖңBinaryвҖқ means вҖңtwo parts,вҖқ since a speculator will only need to predict that an instrument would rise above (Call) or fall below (Put) a certain price level in a given day or week. Unlike Forex, in which you essentially trade currencies, binary options traders can trade indices, Forex, stocks, and commodities.

Sports, markets and businesses are all zero sum games. Then what about binary options?

Is it possible to make money trading binary option? Is it possible to make money trading Forex?
The answer to both questions is yesвҖҰ. If a binary options trader is much conversant with, say, oil market, he can make money predicting whether the price would rise or fall above certain price level in a day or a week.

However, contrary to popular opinion, Forex has certain advantages when compared to binary options. The seeming simplicity of binary options trading вҖ“ only Call or Put вҖ“ doesnвҖҷt mean itвҖҷs easy for enjoying long-term success.

Forex vs. Binary
IвҖҷm a living witness to this fact. A trader who uses a system that has only 50% accuracy can survive in Forex, but there is no way she/he can survive with 50% accuracy when trading binary options. A trader with only 25% accuracy can make money in Forex, but she/he will quickly crash when approaching binary options with a system that has a hit rate of only 25% accuracy.

I can risk $50 or $100 to target $200 in Forex, but thatвҖҷs never possible with binary options. The risks are always higher than the rewards, and thatвҖҷs a worse expectancy. In binary for example, you can risk $100 to gain $50 or $70 or $85 or even $90, but no broker will ever give you a risk-to-reward ratio of 1 to 1, let alone 1 to 2. Forex inherently gives you a risk-to reward ratio of 1 to 10 or 20 or 30, depending on how long youвҖҷre willing to let your profits run. We can enjoy everlasting success with positive expectancy only.

LetвҖҷs say a broker allows a reward of $80 for every $100 you risk for each binary prediction, youвҖҷll then need to achieve at least 70% accuracy to survive in the long-term. Believe me, this is very hard because the future canвҖҷt be predicted. With 70% hit rate, youвҖҷre likely to experience 4 or 5 losses in a row with 1000 trials, and with this, someone with a small account can deplete it before a winning prediction comes around. With rewards that are smaller than risks, chances of long-term survival using 70% accurate systems are slim indeed. Researchers have confirmed that people have trouble surviving with even 80% hit rate, owing to psychological factors.

['Conclusion: IвҖҷm not discouraging people from binary options. There are successful binary traders out there, but IвҖҷve realized that Forex gives me far more freedom to choose my fate in the markets. When you trade a market that youвҖҷre very good at, you make fewer mistakes and improve your results. Investing in what youвҖҷre conversant with is essential to your financial well-being. Genuine wisdom is scarce, and therefore, success is attainable only when you do what youвҖҷre good at. ThatвҖҷs why I enjoy trading Forex: thatвҖҷs my area of competence.

Can World Governments Stop Bitcoin?

CanвҖҷt Kill Bitcoin

CC: WeвҖҷve heard a lot of talk about Bitcoin being officially dead. You obviously disagree. WhatвҖҷs your response?

Beautyon: This is FUD (fear, uncertainty and doubt) or вҖңscaremongering.вҖқ Japan has just formally legalized Bitcoin, and Hong Kong has explicitly said they will not regulate, with their вҖңhands offвҖқ approach. Other countries will follow, and they will absorb all the Bitcoin businesses, which will serve everyone globally. Can world governments stop Bitcoin? Bitcoin is a sea change in the way people think about money and how they account for it. Before Bitcoin, the word вҖңfiatвҖқ was used only by the readers of Lewrockwell. Now everyone, even people who do not like Bitcoin, call the dollar вҖңfiat.вҖқ A powerful transformation is taking place, and it will not be stopped. The USA is not the entire world, and Bitcoin is global. If everywhere other than the USA adopts Bitcoin, then it will be one of the greatest software successes of all time. There is nothing to stop the rest of the world adopting Bitcoin; the GSM standard was everywhere except the USA and eventually they had to capitulate and adopt it.

Bitcoin will succeed. There is nothing any government can do to stop it, just like they canвҖҷt stop file sharing over BitTorrent and Internet Relay Chat. It isnвҖҷt a question of time either. No amount of time can put the Bitcoin genie back in the bottle. This change is forever. The only way out for anyone whose business is challenged by Bitcoin is for them to totally embrace and integrate it. The Japanese have understood this.

The courts in the USA (one in Brooklyn and another in Miami) are also forcing people to wake up out of their collective hysteria. Two separate courts in different jurisdictions have now ruled that Bitcoin is not money. This means the вҖңpoliticosвҖқ have no law to resort to to stop it. Texas has tabled a law to protect Bitcoin as a right. Slowly but surely, everyone is moving to the correct side of Bitcoin.

Bitcoin cannot be stopped. This is not a belief, but a fact, based on the evidence of how it works and previous peer-to-peer software that has lasted for decades. You only need to look at two examples to come to this conclusion.
